{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Navigator’s Vessel
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Navigator’s Vessel]] is a type of ship.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
